x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
https://github.com/Kentico/xperience-by-kentico-manager
│ Command     │ Parameters             │ Description                           │
│ p, profile  │ add, delete, switch    │ Manage and switch installation        │
│             │                        │ profiles                              │
│ i, install  │ db                     │ Installs a new XbK instance. The 'db' │
│             │                        │ parameter installs only a database    │
│ d, delete   │                        │ Deletes a project and its database    │
│ u, update   │                        │ Updates a project's NuGet packages    │
│             │                        │ and database version                  │
│ ci          │ store, restore         │ Stores or restores CI data            │
│ cd          │ store, restore, config │ Stores or restores CD data, or edits  │
│             │                        │ the config file                       │
│ m, macros   │                        │ Re-signs macro signatures             │
│ b, build    │                        │ Builds a project                      │
│ s, settings │                        │ Configures the application settings   │
│             │                        │ of a project                          │
│ g, generate │                        │ Generates code files for Xperience    │
│             │                        │ objects                               │
│ r, report   │                        │ Displays a report with important      │
│             │                        │ project information                   │
